text_block_list.text:
We're at the start of the Classic Triple Crown
tour. King Halo readies herself to take on the first
challenge: the Satsuki Sho.

She makes her way to the paddock and
exchanges a few words with fellow competitor
Seiun Sky.

Though seemingly relaxed on the surface, it's
clear to King Halo that Seiun Sky is in perfect
condition for racing.

Not only does she need to beat Seiun Sky, she
needs great results. Her thirst for victory is
stronger than ever.
